channel.title: Comments on: Oskar Blues: Gordon Goes to Vietnam, Ep. 157
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Honey lee
item.dc:creator: Honey lee
item.description: Great Job Paul! Sorry it took me so long to look it over! You make beer and history interesting!
item.content:encoded: Great Job Paul! Sorry it took me so long to look it over! You make beer and history interesting!

item.title: By: Tom
item.dc:creator: Tom
item.description: Brilliant tribute to a fantastic beer with a wonderful story behind it. Thanks for coming up with the idea, Paul, and following through.
item.content:encoded: Brilliant tribute to a fantastic beer with a wonderful story behind it. Thanks for coming up with the idea, Paul, and following through.

item.title: By: Kathy leone
item.dc:creator: Kathy leone
item.description: Loved Ron's reaction to the beer!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Thanks Marco! Sadly, OB can't promote it because I used a "Gordon" can in the shot and said they were sued by Gorden Biersch, when they were actually just served with a cease and and desist notice. Just goes to show how the big guys can make the little guys lives a little hard if they choose to do so!
item.content:encoded: Thanks Marco! Sadly, OB can’t promote it because I used a “Gordon” can in the shot and said they were sued by Gorden Biersch, when they were actually just served with a cease and and desist notice. Just goes to show how the big guys can make the little guys lives a little hard if they choose to do so!

item.title: By: Marco
item.dc:creator: Marco
item.description:
Wow great video from Vietnam! Nice review too.
Cheers.
item.content:encoded:
Wow great video from Vietnam! Nice review too.

Cheers.
